features.name: Supabase migration — reply_events table
features.description: Create harness/migrations/20260307_reply_events.sql with reply_events table (id, contact_id ref crm_contacts, platform, username, message_text, detected_at, next_action_generated, processed). Apply via mcp__supabase__apply_migration.

features.name: Inbox scanner — per platform
features.description: For each platform (instagram:3100, twitter:3003, tiktok:3102, linkedin:3105): GET conversations, filter unread or newer than last scan cursor. Fetch messages. Include Authorization: Bearer test-token. Handle service down gracefully. Update reply-bridge-state.json.lastScan[platform] after each scan.

features.name: Contact matcher
features.description: For each inbound message: look up sender in crm_contacts by username+platform match. Also check instagram_handle, twitter_handle, tiktok_handle, linkedin_url cross-platform fields. Skip unknown senders. Dedup: skip if reply_events has entry for same contact within last 1h.

features.name: CRM updater — replies_received + pipeline_stage
features.description: On matched reply: UPDATE crm_contacts SET replies_received=replies_received+1, last_inbound_at=now(), pipeline_stage='replied' (only upgrade, never downgrade). Insert reply_events row. POST to CRMLite /api/actions {action:'replied', platform, contact}. Send Telegram: '💬 Reply detected! {name} on {platform}: "{preview}"'.

features.name: Claude next_action generator
features.description: For each new reply: call Claude Haiku (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001) with contact context to generate specific 1-2 sentence next action. Write to crm_contacts.next_action and next_action_at=now()+2h. Write to reply_events.next_action_generated. Fallback template if Claude fails.

features.name: Daemon loop + launch-reply-crm-bridge.sh
features.description: Runs every 15min (REPLY_SCAN_INTERVAL_MINUTES=15). CLI: --once, --dry-run, --scan-now. Log to harness/logs/reply-crm-bridge.log. Launch script with start/stop/status/scan-now/dry-run/logs. Register in watchdog-queue.sh. Startup Telegram notification.

features.name: Integration test suite
features.description: Tests: (1) --dry-run scans without writing CRM, (2) contact matcher finds known username in Supabase, (3) dedup prevents double-counting within 1h, (4) after --once any detected reply has replies_received>0 in Supabase. Print PASS/FAIL.
